name: Fatfree 3 Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh green beans, cut into 1-inch pieces, steamed until tender and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a sealed plastic container.
2. Shake well to mix.
3. Let sit in the fridge overnight. The salad will improve with age and can be stored in the fridge for up to 10 days.
